_note: Maps BAUST Lipi folder index (0-35) -> Bangla letter. BAUST is 30 consonants + 6 vowels; the paper only shows the order in a figure, so this order is PROVISIONAL. The trained model is correct regardless of these strings — only the DISPLAYED letters depend on this file. Verify/fix with: python -m src.make_sample_sheet --dataset baust_lipi --subdir "500 data"  (someone who reads BdSL matches each index to its sign).
